final:
module top_module(
    input in_VPWR,
    input in_VGND,
    input in_VPB,
    input in_VNB,
    output out_VPWR,
    output out_VGND,
    output out_VPB,
    output out_VNB
  assign out_VNB = in_VNB;
  assign out_VPB = in_VPB;
  assign out_VGND = in_VGND;
  assign out_VPWR = in_VPWR;

endmodule
